# Safeparts

> Safeparts is a local-first Rust toolkit for splitting bytes into threshold shares and recombining them through a core library, CLI, TUI, WASM bindings, web UI, and help site.

Use this file as the compact LLM map. Read `llms-full.txt` for the detailed, code-backed maintenance guide with APIs, invariants, parsing rules, and safe change recipes.

Safety rules: treat share strings, SharePacket bytes, reconstructed secrets, ciphertext, and passphrases as secrets. Use only synthetic inputs in examples/tests. Do not commit generated build output such as `target/`, `web/dist/`, or `web/src/wasm_pkg/`.

## Core references

- [Full LLM guide](llms-full.txt): Detailed repository guide for LLM agents.
- [Core API](crates/safeparts_core/src/lib.rs): Split/combine entry points and security flow.
- [Unified encoding API](crates/safeparts_core/src/encoding.rs): Text encoding, parsing, and auto-detection for share packets.
- [Share packet format](crates/safeparts_core/src/packet.rs): Versioned binary packet layout and metadata.
- [Crypto defaults](crates/safeparts_core/src/crypto.rs): Argon2id + ChaCha20-Poly1305 implementation.

## Product surfaces

- [CLI](crates/safeparts/src/main.rs): `safeparts split`, `safeparts combine`, and `safeparts tui` launcher.
- [TUI domain rules](crates/safeparts_tui/src/domain.rs): Interactive parsing, encoding, and combine/split logic.
- [TUI app](crates/safeparts_tui/src/app.rs): Key handling and terminal UI behavior.
- [WASM bindings](crates/safeparts_wasm/src/lib.rs): Browser-facing `split_secret`, `combine_shares`, `share_threshold`, and `inspect_share` exports.
- [Web split flow](web/src/components/SplitForm.tsx): Browser split UX over WASM.
- [Web combine flow](web/src/components/CombineForm.tsx): Browser combine UX, paste heuristics, and encoding selection.

## Repository guidance

- [Agent contract](AGENTS.md): Repository instructions, DOX rules, check pointers, and child documentation index.
- [Product requirements](PRD.md): Product intent, privacy posture, and threat model.
- [README](README.md): Human quickstart and development commands.
- [CI-style checks](docs/agents/checks.md): Local verification commands matching CI.
- [Conventions](docs/agents/conventions.md): Coding and testing standards.

## Optional

- [Help docs](web/help/src/content/docs/): End-user documentation source; code remains the source of truth.
- [Web app entry](web/src/App.tsx): App shell, locale wiring, and help URL integration.
- [WASM build script](web/scripts/build-wasm.sh): Generates `web/src/wasm_pkg/` for the web app.
- [Release packaging](scripts/release/README.md): Local release archive workflow.
